title: Churn metric updated
content:
User: What was our January 2025 churn?
Assistant: Based on the data dashboard exported on February 1, January 2025 monthly churn was 4.2%.

[Two weeks later]

User: Recompute January 2025 churn with the corrected cohort definition.
Assistant: Recomputed. January 2025 monthly churn is 3.8% under the new cohort rule. The 4.2% figure was based on a cohort that incorrectly included paused accounts.
